General.Name: IXAQF
General.Description: IX Acquisition Corp. does not have significant operations. The company intends to effect a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It focuses on companies in technology, media and telecommunications, and information and communication technology industries, as well as companies operating in telecommunications infrastructure, internet and technology, and digital services sectors in Europe and other markets. The company was incorporated in 2021 and is based in London, United Kingdom. IX Acquisition Corp. is a subsidiary of IX Acquisition Sponsor LLC.
General.Address: 53 Davies Street, London, United Kingdom, W1K 5JH
